calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Continued To Sep-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Renee Schaible, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wealth Properties, Inc., a California corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Margo Foster, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: David P. Cincotta as follows:
Damages $116,674.00
Plaintiff waive Prejudgment Interest, Attorney's Fees and Costs.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Renee Schaible, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Wealth Properties Inc. a California Corporation.
Without an Order waiving live witness and no appearace by the Plaintiff, matter is taken off-calendar at counsel's request.
